prose: The frontier-orbitals task on pyridine was executed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The HOMO energy is approximately -7.253 eV, the LUMO energy is about -1.113 eV, resulting in a HOMO-LUMO gap of approximately 6.14 eV. The SCF calculation converged successfully after 10 cycles. Method used: B3LYP/def2-TZVP in PySCF, gas phase, tier 'standard'.
